description: High-level authorization and scope for the Danish platform-neutral digital identity initiative, establishing authority, objectives, governance, and initial constraints; sets the baseline for planning and decision-making.
steps_to_create: Draft project purpose, objectives and high-level scope
Identify steering and sponsor roles and governance structure
Define initial assumptions, constraints and risk exposure
Outline governance, decision rights and approvals needed
Align charter with the strategic decisions in the prompt and obtain formal approvals

description: High-level plan setting scope and approach for demonstrators (FIDO2 on Android/GrapheneOS, browser-based fallback, and potential DID concepts) and the evidentiary approach to support procurement and EU standards engagement.
steps_to_create: Define demonstrator scope options and selection criteria
Outline resource needs, timelines and budgets for each demonstrator path
Establish success metrics and criteria for external review/acceptance
Create a risk/dependency log related to demonstrator development
Draft initial implementation plan for approvals and governance

description: High-level plan for framing, messaging, and engagement to influence Digitaliseringsstyrelsen and other stakeholders; defines the policy narrative, coalition alignment, and approval path.
steps_to_create: Map policy stakeholders and preferred messaging frames
Define advocacy objectives and success metrics
Draft policy proposals and supporting evidence
Align advocacy with Coalition Building and EU engagement strategies
Produce approvals pathway and communication materials

description: Plan to build and sustain a broad coalition (civil society, privacy advocates, researchers, policymakers) to generate political momentum for platform neutrality and resilience.
steps_to_create: Define coalition breadth, member criteria and governance
Develop engagement calendar and event strategy
Establish roles, responsibilities and decision-making processes
Identify risk of internal conflicts and mitigation approaches
Draft approval workflow for coalition activities

description: Plan to shape AltID procurement documents to include platform-neutral access and certified fallback authentication; defines language, scoring, and governance to reduce dependence on single vendors.
steps_to_create: Map platform-neutrality requirements and fallback options
Draft concrete procurement language and evaluation criteria
Define risk controls to prevent gaming of requirements
Coordinate with Legal Counsel and Policy leads on compliance
Establish approval and escalation routes for procurement plan

description: Plan to engage EU bodies around eIDAS2 and European Digital Identity Wallet standards; defines engagement venues, milestones, and alignment with Danish procurement objectives.
steps_to_create: Identify relevant EU standardisation bodies and working groups (ETSI, CEN/CENELEC)
Draft engagement plan with timelines and submission opportunities
Coordinate demonstrator findings to inform EU submissions
Align standardisation activity with procurement and policy goals
Obtain approvals and allocate resources for EU engagement
approval_authorities: Executive Sponsor; EU Policy Steering Group

document_name: Baseline Assessment: Current State of Denmark Digital Identity Infrastructure
description: Baseline document outlining MitID/AltID landscape, governance, dependencies, and risk hotspots to inform planning and strategy.
steps_to_create: Collect existing architecture and governance documents
Summarize dependency on MitID/AltID and external vendors
Identify gaps, risks and opportunities for platform neutrality
Prepare executive brief for governance

description: High-level calendar for the 24-month program, including phase gates, major milestones, and cross-functional dependencies.
steps_to_create: Define phase durations and gate criteria
List milestones and interdependencies
Identify critical path items and risk triggers
Publish for governance approvals

description: Framework defining KPIs, data collection methods, reporting cadence, and governance for tracking progress across strategy areas.
steps_to_create: Define SMART KPIs per intervention area
Design data collection and reporting processes
Set governance and review cadence
Align with decision points and governance
